rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH DEL ROSARIO ET AL VS. CONCHITA MACABEO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp 128.7 For Failure To Meet And Confer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 11, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DEL ROSARIO, MARIA DEL ROSARIO Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp 128.7 For Failure To Meet And Confer Hearing required to address Defendant's failure to comply with CCP § 430.41. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH DEL ROSARIO ET AL VS. CONCHITA MACABEO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 11, 2016, Line 2. DEFENDANT CONCHITA MACABEO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Defendant must answer within ten (10) days of the filing of the Notice of Entry of Order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRENKUS VS. ISH HARSHAWAT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 11, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ISH HARSHAWAT, KAVI HARSHAWAT, ROOPAM HARSHAWAT, PARAS HARSHAWAT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall file an amended complaint within 10 days of the date of the filing of the Notice of Entry of Order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRENKUS VS. ISH HARSHAWAT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 11, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT ISH HARSHAWAT, KAVI HARSHAWAT, ROOPAM HARSHAWAT, PARAS HARSHAWAT MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED as moot. = (501/REQ)
